name: Integration - End-to-end planetary comparison with all services available
description: Tests the full workflow: chunk retrieval from Azure AI Search, LLM generation, formatting, and response via /query endpoint.
input: POST request to /query endpoint with all required Azure and OpenAI services available and documents present.
output: A QueryResponse with success=True and a structured comparative analysis in result.
success_criteria: All service calls (search, LLM) are made
result contains expected comparative content (e.g., mentions of Earth and Jupiter, diameters, distances)
